hooks.command: echo "📊 知识库快照" && echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" && echo "📁 Inbox: $(ls -1 /e/000个人知识库/00Inbox/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l) 个待处理" && echo "📚 学习中: $(grep -rl '#进行中' /e/000个人知识库/10Learning/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) 篇" && echo "" && echo "📝 正在学习:" && for f in $(grep -rl '#进行中' /e/000个人知识库/10Learning/ 2>/dev/null | head -5); do echo "  - $(basename "$f" .md)"; done && echo "" && echo "🕐 最近提交:" && git -C /e/000个人知识库 log --oneline -3
cd /e/000个人知识库 && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "📦 自动同步" && git push)
